title: Painting is Great with Benny Harris
description: Learn to paint with artist Benny Harris and his loyal hedgehog, Penelope.
quote: Sometimes, we just gotta take our accidents and make them a little more chipper. Cheer up there, little moustache! Now that’s a pleasant little mustache we just painted.
altHero: Benny Harris, bearded and curly haired artist, holding a palette next to a painting of a guy with a moustache
alt1: Benny with hedgehog Penelope on his shoulder next to a blank canvas
alt3: closeup of a paintbrush painting the moustache
